data.name: Brown Butter Honeycomb
data.description: Brown butter waffle base, honeycomb and milk chocolate semifreddo finished with milk chocolate glaze.

data.name: Strawberry Basil
data.description: Strawberry compote, basil and vanilla ice cream with Biscoff cookie base.

data.name: Turon Dream Sundae
data.description: Dalgona, caramel-stewed banana, jackfruit and condensed milk over soft serve, finished with a toasted spring roll wrapper and a meringue cloud. A nod to Filipino heritage month.

data.name: Cendol Dream Sundae
data.description: Pandan soft serve made with real pandan leaves and loaded with pearls, grass jelly, lychee jelly and red bean. Refreshing and fragrant.

data.name: Mango Sticky Rice Dream Sundae
data.description: Real mango sorbet swirled with vanilla soft serve, topped with toasted-coconut mochi, a drizzle of coconut cream, and a meringue cloud cookie. Staff favourite. Vegan option will be a modified version of the sundae.

data.name: Vietnamese Coffee Dream Sundae
data.description: Vietnamese coffee soft serve topped with house-made dalgona, a drizzle of condensed milk, and a meringue cloud cookie.

data.name: Labubu On-sen
data.description: By popular request, Labubu returns. Inspired by the relaxing experience of Japanese onsen bathing, this summer dessert is our playful way of turning that feeling into something cool, refreshing, and edible. Choose your favourite creamy shaved ice flavour — Ube, Peach, Mango, Strawberry, or Milky — and customise it with mochi balls and other toppings of your choice. On top sits our signature edible Labubu, crafted from Vanilla or Matcha ice cream and coated in a delicate crispy chocolate shell. Back for another summer. Made for Labubu lovers.

data.name: Croissant Kem Chuoi
data.description: Buttery flaky croissant filled with creamy Vietnamese-style kem chuoi: cold, coconutty, slightly chewy, with roasted peanuts and tropical flavour, finished with a signature chocolate drizzle. Three variants: classic Kem Chuoi, Coco-Ube, and Matcha. Limited quantities daily.

data.name: Vintage Cream Freeze
data.description: An ice cream cake version of one of our classic mango cake flavours in a signature pastel pink buttercream coating.

data.name: Sugar Cone Cake by the Slice
data.description: A unique spin on our daily "cake by the slice" using sugar cones with berry-infused soft serve instead of buttercream. Choose either buttercream or housemade soft serve per slice.

data.name: Butter Baked Alaska
data.description: A Butter Baked Alaska with lemon infusion layered over sponge cake, enveloped in a silky toasted meringue.

data.name: Chè Number One
data.description: Classic coconut milk chè with red tapioca, grass jelly, and fragrant pandan jelly.

data.name: Chè Triple
data.description: Creamy three-colour chè layered with red beans, mung beans, taro, pandan jelly, coconut jelly, and coconut milk.

data.name: Mango Yonami
data.description: A Vietnamese inspired yogurt with sweet mango toppings and boba.

data.name: Ube Mochi Waffle
data.description: Waffle with ultra chewy, mochi-like centers and a light, crispy crust.

data.name: Gummylicious Kooky Cone
data.description: Gummylicious flavoured white chocolate dipped cone with red chocolate drizzle, multicoloured candies and gummy bears.

data.name: Blueberry Crumble Kooky Cone
data.description: Blueberry crumble milk chocolate dipped cone with purple chocolate drizzle, graham cracker crumble and dried blueberries.

data.name: PB&J Brioche Sammie
data.description: Peanut butter gelato, #MafiaMade peanut butter cup chunks, and an organic raspberry variegato ripple, all wrapped up in a toasted Dolce Amore brioche bun.

data.name: Blackberry Lilac Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Blackberry sorbet and lilac ice cream sandwiched between a house-made stroopwafel.

data.name: Strawberry Pepper Lapsang Ice Cream Bar
data.description: Strawberry, bell and black pepper sorbet and smoky lapsang ice cream bar, dipped in dark chocolate.

data.name: Hojicha Raspberry Beet Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Hojicha ice cream and raspberry beet sorbet sandwiched between a black cocoa stroopwafel.

data.name: Peach Osmanthus
data.description: Local peach sorbet and osmanthus green tea ice cream bar, dipped in dark chocolate.

data.name: Pina Colada Bingsu
data.description: Finely shaved ice topped with strawberries, bananas, and whipped cream, blended with classic pina colada and coconut notes for a light and refreshing tropical dessert.

data.name: Taro Bingsu
data.description: Finely shaved ice layered with taro-infused cream, ice cream, crunchy flakes, and chocolate pieces for a lightly sweet, creamy dessert with soft taro notes.

data.name: Mango Coconut Sticky Rice Sundae
data.description: Coconut sticky rice, fresh mango cubes, mango coconut sticky rice ice cream, salted coconut cream, toasted mung beans.

data.name: Mango Coconut Sticky Purple Rice Sundae
data.description: Coconut mixed purple sticky rice, fresh mango cubes, mango coconut sticky rice ice cream, salted coconut cream, toasted mung beans.

data.name: Mango Coconut Slush
data.description: Fresh mango slush, salted coconut cream, fresh mango chunks.

data.name: Mango Coconut Sticky Rice Latte Float
data.description: Fresh mango coconut sticky rice smoothie, salted coconut cream, fresh mango cubes, mango coconut sticky rice ice cream.

data.name: Peach Bingsoo
data.description: Fresh peach with peach ice sorbet and puree.

data.name: DaeJi Bar Bingsoo
data.description: Korean ice cream flavour DaeJibar (piggy bar). Chocolate crumble with strawberry jam ice cream flavour with mochi brownie on top.

data.name: Injeolmi Croffle
data.description: Croffle topped with soybean powder, red bean and mochi.

data.name: Blueberry Yuzu Cheese Kakigori
data.description: Shaved ice filled with yuzu whipped cream, fresh blueberries, and our house-made mini cheesecakes, topped with Fufu's signature cheese whipped cream, then drizzled with condensed milk sauce and blueberry purée.

data.name: Mango Matcha Coconut Kakigori
data.description: Shaved ice filled with mango whipped cream, fresh mango, and our house-made pandan coconut jelly, topped with matcha whipped cream and freeze-dried coconut, then drizzled with coconut condensed milk sauce and mango purée.

data.name: Snack Size Dough Boy
data.description: Smaller Dough Boy: chocolate chip cookie dough pieces, cookies and cream ice cream and hot fudge topped with whipped cream.

data.name: Snack Size Peanut Butter Dream
data.description: Snack-size version: vanilla or chocolate ice cream, peanut butter sauce, magic shell, peanuts and peanut butter cups, all topped with whipped cream.

data.name: Snack Size Canadian Mint
data.description: Mint chocolate chip ice cream, hot fudge, magic shell and roasted salted almonds. Topped with whipped cream.

data.name: Snack Size Blackout
data.description: Chocolate ice cream, hot fudge, chocolate cookie crumb, and magic shell. Topped with chocolate whipped cream and jimmies.

data.name: HK Milk Tea Gelato Pineapple Bun
data.description: Premium HK-style milk tea gelato served inside Ho Yuen's signature pineapple bun.

data.name: Evil Angel Chocolate Pineapple Bun
data.description: Vanilla gelato and caramel syrup served inside Ho Yuen's chocolate pineapple bun.

data.name: Golden Pudding Pineapple Bun
data.description: Smooth egg pudding served inside Ho Yuen's pineapple bun.

data.name: Pineapple Meets Pineapple Bun
data.description: Refreshing pineapple sorbetto served inside Ho Yuen's pineapple bun.

data.name: Cereal Swirl: Fruity Pebbles
data.description: Silky non-dairy ice cream with your favourite cereal for a rainbow scoop.

data.name: Cereal Swirl: Cinnamon Toast Crunch
data.description: Creamy, dairy-free bliss meets cinnamon-toast crunch.

data.name: Juicy Pear Fro-Yo Donut
data.description: A fresh dipped OohLaLa donut sliced in half and sandwiched around freshly-churned pear frozen yogurt.

data.name: Summer Melon Ice Cream Donut
data.description: A fresh dipped OohLaLa donut sliced in half and sandwiched around freshly-churned watermelon ice cream.

data.name: Vanilla Baklava Sundae
data.description: Crispy fluffy pastry base filled with pistachio paste and crunchy kataifi, topped with a scoop of house-made vanilla ice cream and finished with warm chocolate sauce.

data.name: Pistachio Baklava Sundae
data.description: Crispy fluffy pastry layered with pistachio paste and toasted kataifi, topped with a scoop of pistachio ice cream and drizzled with chocolate sauce.

data.name: Gingirella and the Prince: The Sugar-Free Garden
data.description: Keto, functional, diabetic-friendly, zero-refined sugar gelato: a botanical romance where the floral sweetness of lychee meets the deep, amber warmth of house-steeped candied ginger. Festival Flight Days (Sun Jun 22 + Sun Jun 29): $19.95 for a 3-flavour kid-size flight pairing this festival flavour with two more of your choice from the regular menu.

data.name: Black Dahlia
data.description: A noir expression of fruit and cacao: a velvet-textured vegan blackberry gelato infused with the smoky, floral warmth of green cardamom. Festival Flight Days (Sun Jul 6 + Sun Jul 13): $19.95 for a 3-flavour kid-size flight pairing this festival flavour with two more of your choice from the regular menu.

data.name: Blue Velvet
data.description: Floral, aromatic, serene. A dream-like infusion of wild organic lavender and calming chamomile. Festival Flight Days (Sun Jul 20 + Sun Jul 27): $19.95 for a 3-flavour kid-size flight pairing this festival flavour with two more of your choice from the regular menu.

data.name: Dubai Chocolate Sundae
data.description: Raspberry frozen yogurt, chocolate frozen yogurt, kanafeh, strawberries, pistachios, chocolate shavings, and chocolate sauce.

data.name: Tiramisu Sundae
data.description: Tiramisu cake, vanilla frozen yogurt, Nespresso powder, chocolate shavings, and chocolate sauce.

data.name: Frozen Fruity Popsicle
data.description: Frozen fruit (strawberry, mango, raspberry, orange, cherry) popsicles dipped in chocolate to create a crunch.

data.name: Ice Cream Onigiri
data.description: House-made (mango / black sesame) ice cream sandwiches with chiffon and wrapped with our house-made seaweed (crepe).

data.name: Go Canada Go
data.description: Strawberry apple slush decorated with our Canada flag: white milk soccer ball and a red maple leaf.

data.name: East Meets Maple
data.description: A waffle bowl filled with our signature ashta and Lotus Biscoff ice cream, topped with whipped cream, crushed pistachios, and a rich maple syrup drizzle.

data.name: Fruity Cup
data.description: Three scoops of vegan ice cream topped with cotton candy and fresh strawberry.

data.name: Ashta Crunch Nest
data.description: A nest of crispy knefeh pastry filled with Ashta ice cream, sweet syrup and cotton candy.

data.name: Hwachae Float
data.description: We re-imagined the popular Korean summer dessert in the form of a pink soft serve float! Juicy watermelon sorbet, creamy strawberry soft serve, and fizzy milkis (milk soda) all on a bed of mango coconut stars. You'll like this one.

data.name: Lychee Osmanthus Float
data.description: Osmanthus has been the flower of 2026 so far - floral, sweet, with hints of stone fruits. We combined it with our favourite stone fruit of all: lychee. Served as a float with club soda over a bed of lychee and osmanthus jelly.

data.name: Tokyo Bananana
data.description: Inspired by every Japanese tourist's go-to souvenir. Triple banana: (1) banana pudding soft serve made with real banana puree, (2) banana custard filling in our taiyaki cone, and (3) banana chiffon cake.

data.name: The Ultimate Pistachio Crunch
data.description: DOP pistachio paste from Sicily wrapped in crispy pistachio kataifi, coated in a chewy chocolate shell and dusted with cocoa powder. Nutty, chocolatey, crunchy, chewy.

data.name: The Pistachio Obsession
data.description: DOP pistachio gelato folded with crushed pistachio nuts and topped with whipped cream. For the pistachio devoted.

data.name: Ferrero Rocher
data.description: Ultra-rich chocolate hazelnut gelato over crisp wafer shards and premium roasted hazelnuts. Ferrero Rocher reimagined in scoop form.

data.name: White Rabbit
data.description: Velvety creamy gelato that captures the iconic White Rabbit candy's milk flavour. No added sugar so the nostalgic sweetness of the candy shines through.

data.name: Maiko Halo-Halo
data.description: A cool twist on the Filipino classic. Creamy matcha ice cream, red bean, coconut jelly, tapioca pearls, ube, caramel flan, and crunchy cornflakes. Sweet, chewy, refreshing.

data.name: Matcha Pineapple Paradise Parfait
data.description: Layers of fluffy matcha sponge cake, sweet-tart pineapple compote, crunchy crumble, chewy warabi mochi, and a matcha-pineapple soft serve swirl. Finished with fresh pineapple and a dusting of premium matcha.

data.name: Matcha Screamer
data.description: First-harvest matcha by Yamamasa Koyamaen slushie with oat milk base and topped with a creamy rich matcha ice cream from Ice Keem.

data.name: Matcha-Colada Slushie
data.description: Matcha slushie with a twist. Made with house-made pineapple puree, first-harvest matcha by Yamamasa Koyamaen, and topped with a rich creamy coconut ice cream from Ice Keem.

data.name: HK Matcha Float
data.description: A nostalgic Cha Chaan Teng classic. Red bean paste and grass jelly in a refreshing slushie with first-harvest matcha from Yamamasa Koyamaen, topped with a scoop of classic vanilla ice cream from Ice Keem.

data.name: Hojicha Screamer
data.description: Premium hojicha slushie topped with a creamy hojicha ice cream from Ice Keem.

data.name: Pistachio Kataifi (Dubai-style)
data.description: Roasted, salted pistachio ice cream with toasted kataifi and pistachio paste. Dipped in milk chocolate (dairy and vegan available).

data.name: Hojicha Horchata Slush
data.description: A super refreshing hojicha horchata slush with a honey cold foam. One size.

data.name: Corn on the Cup
data.description: Caramel corn ice cream sundae with warm salted caramel and corn-themed toppings.

data.name: Fruit Fruits
data.description: Festival-exclusive flavour. Fruit Loops cereal milk ice cream with fruit roll-up chips. Scoop pricing ($5 to $8).

data.name: Cookie Monster Donut Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Blue vanilla ice cream with Oreo cookies and cookie dough in between a glazed donut.

data.name: Strawberry Biscoff Donut Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Sweet milk ice cream with strawberry swirl and Biscoff biscuits in toasted glazed donut.

data.name: Ube Oreo Donut Ice Cream Sammies
data.description: Ube ice cream and Oreo cookies in toasted glazed donut.

data.name: Chocolate Hazelnut Donut Ice Cream Sammies
data.description: Chocolate hazelnut ice cream in toasted glazed donut.

data.name: Premium Matcha Parfait
data.description: Signature parfait layered with house-made matcha jelly, chocolate sauce, matcha ice cream, Lotus Biscoff cookies and corn flakes, topped with matcha whipped cream, shiratama mochi balls, matcha nama chocolate, and premium matcha powder.

data.name: Triple Matcha Soft Serve
data.description: Matcha soft serve drizzled with matcha syrup and finished with premium matcha powder.

data.name: Champion's Charm
data.description: Canadian maple swirled with pistachio to kick off the World Cup teams. Scoop pricing ($5 to $8); waffle cone extra.

data.name: Cherry Moonkiss
data.description: Condensed milk smeared with sweet roasted cherries. Scoop pricing ($5 to $8); waffle cone extra.

data.name: Peach Golden Hour
data.description: Peach and a hint of black tea sorbetto to match a Kitsilano sunset. Scoop pricing ($5 to $8).

data.name: Chocolate Noir
data.description: Chocolate gelato sprinkled with in-house baked chocolate chunk cookies. Scoop pricing ($5 to $8).

data.name: Strawberry White Chocolate Matcha Dipped Cone
data.description: A twist on our classic strawberry soft serve cone, dipped in silky white chocolate matcha and finished with a delicate dusting of freeze-dried strawberries.

data.name: Mixed Berry 99
data.description: A blend of strawberry, raspberry, blackberry and blueberry mixed with Plain Jane's signature ice cream topped with the iconic 99 flake. Available in cup.

data.name: Summer Winterland
data.description: Winter melon tea lemonade sorbet with house-made salted cheese foam and grass jelly, topped with lime zest. Available at all locations.

data.name: HK Afternoon Tea
data.description: Hong Kong milk tea soft serve with condensed milk drizzle and Ceylon tea powder dust, complemented with mini house-made Hong Kong-style French toast with kaya filling.

data.name: Tropical Heat
data.description: Egg bun, pandan caramel cheese foam, coconut shredded, almond slice, peanut, coconut ice cream, coconut cream.

data.name: Stinky Wave
data.description: Fresh durian, coconut shred, durian ice cream, milk, coconut cream.

data.name: Ginger Oolong Gelato
data.description: Zesty ginger with the robust flavours of oolong tea.

data.name: Graham Cookie Butter
data.description: The taste of caramelized brown sugar with warm spices.

data.name: Strawberry Matcha Mochi Sundae
data.description: Fresh house-made strawberry sauce under vanilla soft serve, drizzled with premium matcha sauce and finished with chewy mochi balls. Earthy matcha balanced against sweet strawberry.

data.name: Go Canada! FIFA World Cup Sundae
data.description: Vancouver's FIFA World Cup 2026 tribute. Strawberry sauce and vanilla soft serve in red and white, decorated with maple leaf cookies, soccer-themed candy, coconut jelly, and a Canadian flag pick.

data.name: Crunchy Tiramisu Milk Tea
data.description: Ice-blended coffee-based milk tea topped with pearls, a rich house-made tiramisu foam, buttercrisp and cocoa.

data.name: Crunchy Strawberry Milk Tea
data.description: Ice-blended strawberry milk tea drink with jasmine green tea base, topped with pearls, house-made sweet cream and buttercrisp.

data.name: Latte's Hojicha Osmanthus Soft Serve
data.description: Hojicha (roasted green tea) infused vegan soft serve topped with sweet, floral osmanthus syrup. Cup $6.95, cone $7.95, waffle $8.95. Gluten-free if served in a cup.

data.name: Pepper's Ginger Guava Soft Serve
data.description: Guava-flavoured vegan soft serve, lightly spiced with ginger and topped with fresh house-made ginger syrup. Cup $6.95, cone $7.95, waffle $8.95. Gluten-free in a cup.

data.name: Hojicha Osmanthus Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Vegan hojicha soft serve and osmanthus syrup sandwiched between two oatmeal cookies.

data.name: Ginger Guava Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Vegan ginger-guava soft serve sandwiched between two mini ginger snap cookies.

data.name: Caramelized Pear & Toasted Coconut Cone
data.description: Vanilla soft serve topped with our house-made pear sauce, toasted coconut, and a piece of house-made caramelized pear.

data.name: Caramelized Pear & Toasted Coconut Sundae
data.description: Vanilla soft serve topped with our house-made pear sauce, toasted coconut, and a piece of house-made caramelized pear.

data.name: Double Strawberry Mochi
data.description: Strawberry flavour gelato mixed with freeze-dried strawberries.

data.name: Mint Chocolate Chips Mochi
data.description: Mint chocolate flavour gelato mixed with chocolate chips.

data.name: White Peach and Oolong Fruit Shell Gelato
data.description: Peach fruit shell filled with white peach and oolong flavour gelato.

data.name: Mint Green Apple Fruit Shell Gelato
data.description: Apple fruit shell filled with mint green apple sorbet.

data.name: Summer Sundae
data.description: Tropical layered cup: toasted coconut, mango sorbetto, vegan caramel, coconut sorbetto, mango sauce, toasted coconut flakes. Two fruits, one nut, every layer purposeful.

data.name: Vivid Vancouver Sundae
data.description: Seven layers: chocolate-hazelnut sauce, pistachio gelato, Biscoff crumbs, strawberry sorbet, pistachio sauce with kataifi, blue vanilla gelato, pistachio dust.

data.name: Gelato Bonbons (Uno Gelato x Mink Chocolates)
data.description: Box of 8 bonbons. Milk chocolate bonbon filled with Uganda vanilla gelato and rosemary burnt caramel. Dark chocolate bonbon filled with passion fruit sorbetto.

data.name: Mocha Ice Cream Sundae
data.description: House-made mocha ice cream topped with coconut whipped cream, dark chocolate sauce and a Biscoff cookie.

data.name: Strawberry Matcha Ice Cream Bar
data.description: House-made matcha ice cream with strawberry compote inside a dark chocolate shell.

data.name: Strawberry Ice Cream Sandwich
data.description: Strawberry cheesecake ice cream in a wafer sandwich, with a dark chocolate coating and topped with crushed almonds.

data.name: World Cup Sundae
data.description: Creamy vanilla soft serve topped with an intense matcha drizzle, and bittersweet cocoa crunch.

data.name: FIFA Floatie
data.description: A full stadium moment in a cup! Iced matcha oatmilk latte served in a white chocolate dipped cup, stacked with vanilla soft serve, matcha drizzle, and cocoa crunch. Sub with puffed rice as GF option.

data.name: Umaji Mura Kuki-Fizz
data.description: Bright yuzu soda balanced with the gentle roasted notes of kuki-hojicha and refreshing fizz. Themed merch (tote bags and stickers) is available.

data.name: Umaji Mura Floatie
data.description: Smooth matcha and oatmilk topped with creamy yuzu soft serve for a balance of citrus tang and soft umami. Themed merch (tote bags and stickers) is available.
